fields.name: query
fields.comment: The user query about employee information or leave requests

fields.name: today
fields.comment: Today's date in ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd), used to anchor date calculations in the agent

fields.name: pastConversation
fields.comment: Past conversation history passed from the top-level chat agent

fields.name: leaveType
fields.comment: Type of leave as provided by the AI agent

fields.name: startDate
fields.comment: First day of leave as ISO date string (yyyy-MM-dd)

fields.name: endDate
fields.comment: Last day of leave as ISO date string (yyyy-MM-dd)

fields.name: confirmationMessage
fields.comment: Confirmation message returned by createLeaveRequest tool
